title: Cosmic Self Exploration
definition: The idea that the universe intentionally glitched itself to facilitate self-exploration.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The idea that the universe created a part of itself (us, consciousness) that doesn't fully understand the whole universe, allowing for exploration and discovery.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A hypothesis suggesting that the universe intentionally introduced a self-aware entity (humans) to help it better understand itself by experiencing limited self-awareness.
difficulty_levels.expert: A philosophical proposition positing that the universe deliberately created self-aware entities, with inherent limitations, as an exploratory tool to understand its own nature, leading to the emergence of the ego and the illusion of separation.

extra_fields.insight: The universe intentionally introduced a self-aware entity (humans) with limited self-awareness to explore itself
